mapper.select: SELECT ci.*, p.name as product_name, p.image as product_image, p.price as price, p.stock as stock FROM cart_item ci LEFT JOIN product p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ci.create_time DESC

SELECT ci.*, p.name as product_name, p.image as product_image, p.price as price, p.stock as stock FROM cart_item ci LEFT JOIN product p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.user_id = #{userId} AND ci.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (user_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
